trait.name: Dual-Forge Hammers
entries: The brute wields a Frost Hammer and a Cinder Hammer. Its hammer attacks count as magical.

trait.name: Overrun Frame
entries: The brute has advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. In addition, it can move through the space of a Medium or smaller creature. The first time it enters a creature's space on a turn, that creature must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pushed 5 feet to an unoccupied space of its choice and knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The brute makes two hammer attacks, one with its Frost Hammer and one with its Cinder Hammer.

action.name: Frost Hammer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) cold damage.

action.name: Cinder Hammer
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d8 + 6}) bludgeoning damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage.

action.name: Thermal Clash (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The brute slams both hammers into the ground, releasing a violent shock of hot and cold. Each creature of the brute's choice within 15 feet must make a {@dc 15} Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 ({@damage 6d6}) fire damage and 21 ({@damage 6d6}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails the save has its speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.
